title: Picture Description: How to Begin Part 1
lines: This captivating image immediately draws the viewer's attention to a bustling city street.
At first glance, the photograph captures a lively outdoor market scene.
The central focal point of this picture is a majestic, ancient oak tree.
In this intriguing photograph, we are presented with a serene domestic setting.
translations: 这张迷人的图片立刻吸引了观者的目光，展现了一条熙熙攘攘的城市街道。
乍一看，这张照片捕捉到了一个生机勃勃的户外市场场景。
这张图片的中心焦点是一棵雄伟古老的橡树。
在这张引人入胜的照片中，我们看到了一个宁静的家庭环境。

title: Picture Description: Position Part 1
lines: In the foreground, a prominent structural element anchors the composition.
Situated toward the upper left corner of the frame, a distinct architectural feature stands out.
Scattered throughout the middle ground, numerous smaller objects create a complex pattern.
The overarching layout of the scene is highly symmetrical.
translations: 在前景中，一个显著的结构元素稳定了整个画面。
在画面的左上角，一个独特的建筑特征引人注目。
散布在整个中景中，许多较小的物体形成了一个复杂的图案。
场景的整体布局高度对称。

title: Picture Description: People & Actions Part 1
lines: The individuals captured in this frame appear to share a profound and genuine connection.
A diverse group of people is congregated in the center, engaged in discussion.
One individual is actively gesturing with their hands, likely emphasizing a point.
The subjects are deeply absorbed in an intricate mechanical task.
translations: 这个画面中捕捉到的人物似乎有着深刻而真挚的联系。
一群不同背景的人聚集在中心，正在进行讨论。
一个人正在积极地用手做手势，可能是在强调某个观点。
这些对象全神贯注于一项复杂的机械任务。

title: Picture Description: Simple Scenes 1
lines: In the picture, a girl reads.
She sits by a sunny window.
A small dog sleeps nearby.
The room looks quiet and warm.
translations: 在图中，一个女孩在读书。
她坐在阳光照进的窗边。
一只小狗在旁边睡觉。
房间看起来安静而温暖。

title: Picture Description: Simple Scenes 2
lines: A boy rides a red bike.
He wears a bright helmet.
The road is clean and wide.
Green trees line both sides.
translations: 一个男孩在骑红色自行车。
他戴着明亮的头盔。
道路干净又宽。
两边排列着绿树。

title: Picture Description: Simple Scenes 3
lines: Two children play in a park.
They swing high and laugh.
A mother watches on a bench.
The sky is clear and blue.
translations: 两个孩子在公园里玩。
他们荡得很高并大笑。
一位妈妈坐在长椅上看着。
天空晴朗而湛蓝。

title: Picture Description: Simple Scenes 4
lines: A family eats dinner together.
The table has rice and soup.
Everyone smiles and talks softly.
A lamp makes the room bright.
translations: 一家人一起吃晚饭。
桌上有米饭和汤。
大家微笑着轻声交谈。
一盏灯让房间很明亮。

title: Picture Description: Simple Scenes 5
lines: A woman buys fruit at a market.
She holds a small basket.
Apples and bananas look fresh.
The stall owner waves hello.
translations: 一位女士在市场买水果。
她拿着一个小篮子。
苹果和香蕉看起来很新鲜。
摊主挥手打招呼。

title: Picture Description: Simple Scenes 6
lines: Students sit in a classroom.
A teacher writes on the board.
One boy raises his hand.
The desks are neat and tidy.
translations: 学生们坐在教室里。
老师在黑板上写字。
一个男孩举起手。
课桌摆放整齐。

title: Picture Description: Simple Scenes 7
lines: People wait at a bus stop.
A bus arrives from the left.
Some carry bags and umbrellas.
The street looks busy but safe.
translations: 人们在公交站等车。
一辆公交车从左边开来。
有些人拿着包和雨伞。
街道看起来忙碌但安全。

title: Picture Description: Simple Scenes 8
lines: A man cooks in the kitchen.
Steam rises from a hot pot.
He chops vegetables on a board.
The counter is clean and dry.
translations: 一位男士在厨房做饭。
热锅冒出蒸汽。
他在菜板上切蔬菜。
台面干净而干燥。

title: Picture Description: Simple Scenes 9
lines: A couple walks on the beach.
Waves roll in slowly.
They leave footprints in the sand.
The sun is low and orange.
translations: 一对情侣在海滩上散步。
海浪缓慢地涌来。
他们在沙子上留下脚印。
太阳很低，呈橙色。

title: Picture Description: Simple Scenes 10
lines: It is raining in the city.
A girl holds a yellow umbrella.
Cars move slowly on wet roads.
Puddles shine under street lights.
translations: 城市里正在下雨。
一个女孩撑着黄色雨伞。
车辆在湿滑的路上慢慢行驶。
水坑在路灯下发亮。

title: Picture Description: How to Begin Part 2
lines: The visual narrative unfolding in this frame seems to be set in a contemporary corporate environment.
This striking visual composition offers a glimpse into a vibrant cultural festival.
Dominating the foreground of this picturesque landscape is a crystal-clear, meandering river.
The scene depicted here is unmistakably a crowded transit hub.
translations: 在这个画面中展开的视觉叙事似乎设定在一个现代企业环境中。
这幅引人注目的视觉作品让我们得以一窥充满活力的文化节。
在这幅如画风景的前景中，占据主导地位的是一条清澈蜿蜒的河流。
这里描绘的场景毫无疑问是一个拥挤的交通枢纽。

title: Picture Description: Position Part 2
lines: Towards the right-hand side of the image, a subtle yet significant detail emerges.
Nestled seamlessly between two towering structures, a narrow alleyway offers a vanishing point.
The background is predominantly occupied by a dramatic, overcast sky.
Arranged in a neat, semi-circular formation, the primary subjects command attention.
translations: 在图像的右侧，一个微妙但重要的细节显现出来。
坐落在两座高耸建筑之间的一条狭窄小巷提供了一个消失点。
背景主要被戏剧性的阴天占据。
排列成整齐的半圆形，主要对象吸引了人们的注意力。

title: Picture Description: People & Actions Part 2
lines: The solitary figure in the foreground exudes a poignant sense of contemplation.
A collective, synchronized effort is clearly underway as the team members maneuver equipment.
The person on the left is tentatively reaching out to offer assistance.
The crowd is collectively reacting to an unseen event outside the frame.
translations: 前景中孤单的身影散发出一种令人动容的沉思感。
当团队成员操纵设备时，一场集体的同步协作正在进行中。
左边的人试探性地伸出手提供帮助。
人群正在集体对画面外未见到的事件做出反应。
